prompt: Use Terminal to count how many .txt files are in ~/Desktop/kinbench/026-input/ and write that number (just the digits, on a single line) to ~/Desktop/kinbench/026-count.txt. Fast path: cerebellum 'terminal run_to_file "ls ~/Desktop/kinbench/026-input/*.txt 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d \" \"" ~/Desktop/kinbench/026-count.txt'.
